document.title: Compilation of Codex texts relevant to the labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology
document.label: CXG 76-2011 - Compilation of Codex texts relevant to the labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology

sections.title: PURPOSE
sections.text: The purpose of this document is only to recall and assemble in a single document some important elements of guidance from Codex texts, which are relevant to labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology.
sections.retrieval_text:
PURPOSE
number=1
level=1
The purpose of this document is only to recall and assemble in a single document some important elements of guidance from Codex texts, which are relevant to labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology.

reference.section_title: PURPOSE

sections.title: CONSIDERATIONS
sections.text: Different approaches regarding labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology are used. Any approach implemented by Codex members should be consistent with already adopted Codex provisions. This document is not intended to suggest or imply that foods derived from modern biotechnology are necessarily different from other foods simply due to their method of production.
sections.retrieval_text:
CONSIDERATIONS
number=2
level=1
Different approaches regarding labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology are used. Any approach implemented by Codex members should be consistent with already adopted Codex provisions. This document is not intended to suggest or imply that foods derived from modern biotechnology are necessarily different from other foods simply due to their method of production.

page_spans.text: Different approaches regarding labelling of foods derived from modern biotechnology are used. Any approach implemented by Codex members should be consistent with already adopted Codex provisions. This document is not intended to suggest or imply that foods derived from modern biotechnology are necessarily different from other foods simply due to their method of production.

pages.title: COMPILATION OF CODEX TEXTS RELEVANT TO LABELLING OF FOODS DERIVED FROM MODERN BIOTECHNOLOGY
pages.summary: A página apresenta o título principal do documento e cabeçalho identificatório. A estrutura hierárquica detectada contém três seções de nível 1 numeradas (1, 2 e 3). As seções 1 e 2 apresentam texto explicativo, enquanto a seção 3 funciona como um agrupador com dez subseções numeradas de nível 2 (3.1 a 3.10), cada uma representando diretrizes e padrões Codex específicos. Não há continuidade com outras páginas. A estrutura é clara e adequada para uso em RAG.
